scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web && fg
scripts.setup: npm install && cd apps/api && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.test: echo 'Testing backend...' && curl -s http://localhost:8001/api/config | python3 -c "import sys,json; print('✓ Backend OK' if json.load(sys.stdin).get('university_name') else '✗ Backend Failed')" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'Frontend: %{http_code}\n' http://localhost:3000
